title: paeonia corallina var. russoi
intro: Paeonia corallina var. russoi, also known as Russian peony, is a plant species belonging to the peony genus, known for its vibrant red flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Paeonia corallina var. russoi include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
